title: WMP Test Vector
description: A single input/expected-output pair for WMP conformance testing.

expected_response.description: The expected JSON-RPC response (if request). Use null to assert no response is produced (e.g. notifications).

handler_action.description: Instruction for the test harness handler. Used only in interop tests.

return.description: Value to return from the handler.

error.description: JSON-RPC error object to return from the handler.

peer_options.description: Peer-level configuration for the test harness. Used only in interop tests.

authorize.description: If false, the authorizer hook rejects the request.

validate.description: If false, the validator hook rejects the params.
